[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

1 000000001 1
2 011000000 2
3 011000010 3
4 011000000 2
5 000010000 1
6 001010100 3
7 100000001 2
